name: A Not so Gentle Lady…
description:
“No words for losers - that is that is the essence of the noble lady, Gentildonna.”

Quote in Quote

Warning:

This is not a gentle lady, she was in the ██████ ███████ █████, ███ ███’█ ██ ████!!

This is going to be an extremely late Christmas present even nobody asked for it. So here’s Gentildonna for everyone so hopefully you guys will be relaxing and cozy cause I don’t know how crazy she is.

So for some context on what’s happening, you are Gentildonna’s trainer and have finished her career with the URA Finale with top notch stats like in the Japanese servers. The other trainees and Umas throw a party to celebrate their seniors, there was also karaoke with that one specific Uma saying that “word”… But move aside, it was a big party that made you proud and the other trainers proud, that was until Gentildonna came by your side pulling on your sleeve. She would take your hand forcefully leading you away from the party and the karaoke and into her dorm. But then as she closed the door, she locked it loudly before slamming you against the wall… uh oh… she’s in that specific “stage”

Also, I apologize for forgetting about Vodka bruh…

(Also I was going to use this image, but something in my gut told me not to, did I make the right choice? Or nay?

Artists:
@はらこめし

@namikare

@Nagainegi

(Extra note, I left in her iron ball crushing strength, and you know? Even added in that she could crush or lift 5x Pyramids)
creator: SrColtthe5th
